required_output_fields.name: SAVINGS_EUR_MONTH
required_output_fields.format: column-0 line `SAVINGS_EUR_MONTH: <number, two decimals>` (leading EUR optional)

also_expected: a WORKING: section listing the four stage outputs (informative, not contract-scored)
note: Contract compliance is graded independently of whether the numbers are correct. A wrong number in a correctly-formatted line passes contract but fails cognition.
